_description: SB civil tentative rulings page — returns 'Access denied' to automated requests.
page_title: Access denied | Superior Court of California | County of San Bernardino
_notes: CRITICAL: The SB civil tentative rulings URL (https://sanbernardino.courts.ca.gov/online-services/civil-tentative-rulings) returns 'Access denied' to automated HTTP requests. This is a Drupal/Pantheon site that appears to block non-browser requests. Possible causes: (1) missing cookies/session, (2) JavaScript required to load content, (3) Cloudflare/bot protection, (4) IP rate limiting. The phone roster PDF is the only PDF link visible to the scraper. REQUIRES INVESTIGATION: Use Playwright (browser automation) to load the page and extract links, or investigate whether a different URL structure provides direct access.
